title: tephrosia littoralis
intro: Tephrosia littoralis, also known as the Beach Tephrosia or Coast Bean, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia littoralis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia littoralis include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
